repo_public_scan.q: Is the GitHub repo public with README, LICENSE file, and working install instructions?

license_clear.q: Does README include SPDX license identifier and one-sentence commercial-use clarity?

release_tagged.q: Is there at least one semver tag (e.g. v0.1.0) with GitHub Release notes?

registry_listed.q: Is the package published on npm/PyPI/crates.io (or equivalent) with repo link?

email_list_check.q: Do you have ≥500 subscribers who opted in for product updates?

star_baseline.q: Are GitHub stars ≥50 OR do you have 3+ weeks of OSS runway (issues, releases, list PRs in flight)?

show_hn_planned.q: Is Show HN (community-launch) scheduled ≥48h after README + CHANGELOG polish?

aggressive_window.q: Is launch ≥7 days out with 3+ awesome-list targets researched and maintainer DM ethics signed?
